_provenance.basis: direction B (NYC-flavoured) with Mode A pinned

dos: Lead every page with audience routing in viewport one.
Use Sharp Grotesk Semibold ≥ 4 times per home, at scales ≥ 64px.
Reserve solid panynj-blue fill for the single primary action per surface.
Reuse captured photography at intended dimensions; always with descriptive alt.
Disclose construction state inline near the affected affordance.
Write headlines a New Yorker would say out loud.
donts: No centered-hero + dual-CTA + 3-col-icon-card silhouette as default.
No 'the journal,' 'atelier,' 'the studio' — JFK is not a magazine.
No fare-deal banners or destination-promo carousels.
No gold accents, no dark-mode cinematic.
No yellow used decoratively — warnings only.
No panynj-blue solid text on body grounds — use panynj-deep-blue.

flightSearchPanel.position: nested in audience router default state on home; full-width on /flights

departuresBoard.position: below routing on /flights; collapsed accordion on home

editorialPhotoBlock.position: interleaved between operational sections, ≥ 1 per home

footer.purpose: grouped utility links + PANYNJ co-brand + social

iaPriorities.evidence: 5 distinct audiences captured in pages/home.json + brand-extraction; current site routing is implicit
iaPriorities.preserveAs: first 1.5 viewports on home; first viewport on IA pillar pages
iaPriorities.constraint: every page must surface a 'who is this for' affordance before any editorial content

iaPriorities.evidence: tabbed flight-search panel is the load-bearing conversion (captured pattern)
iaPriorities.preserveAs: first-viewport on home (nested under Departing/Arriving routes), full-width inline on /flights

iaPriorities.evidence: $19B redevelopment causes ongoing pickup/access disruption (captured advisory on /transportation)
iaPriorities.preserveAs: first-class section on home (status strip), inline on transportation/parking
iaPriorities.scope: all pages touching pickup/parking/terminal access through 2028

iaPriorities.evidence: dedicated /accessibility-services hub with 5 sub-pages; current site surfaces it in primary nav

applied.guardrail: no centered-hero + dual-CTA + 3-col-icon-card-grid as the default home pattern

applied.rule: Editorial-register vocabulary applied to non-editorial brands
applied.guardrail: no 'atelier' / 'journal' / 'studio' / 'gazette' headers — JFK is civic, not editorial

applied.rule: Hero text on photographic background without contrast scrim
applied.guardrail: every overlaid headline gets a gradient scrim or a guaranteed contrast position
panynj-blue solid fill = single primary action; everything else uses non-color cues + panynj-deep-blue link color
named-people stories use captured photo subjects only; no invented quotes or fake bios

amplified_trait.evidence: captured Sharp Grotesk capability + named-people photography pattern + NYC-as-context register

brand_faithful_inversions.from: blue carries every cue (link, CTA, headline)
brand_faithful_inversions.to: blue carries single primary action; type weight + scale carry hierarchy

brand_faithful_inversions.from: Sharp Grotesk reserved for hero only
brand_faithful_inversions.to: Sharp Grotesk used ≥ 4× per home at ≥ 64px
explicit 5-way audience router in viewport one

brand_faithful_inversions.from: editorial photos rendered at thumbnail scale, alt-text empty
brand_faithful_inversions.to: full-bleed 16:9, descriptive alt, srcset matched to render size

brand_faithful_inversions.from: template silhouette repeated across all IA pillars
brand_faithful_inversions.to: broken on home; each IA pillar varies layout strategy

narrative.northStar: A civic-grade airport service site that earns its New York identity through type, photography, and voice — without becoming a marketing brand.
narrative.overview: Audience-aware home, editorial + operational sections interleaved, type-led hierarchy, single-action color discipline, construction-aware editorial.
keyCharacteristics: Audience routing in viewport one on every page
Sharp Grotesk Semibold cashed at section scale, not just hero
Single primary action per surface in panynj-blue
Photography of named people at intended dimensions
Construction status as first-class section type
rules: Solid panynj-blue = single primary action per surface
Inline links use panynj-deep-blue with hover underline
Every editorial photo carries descriptive alt + srcset
